characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick this unit if it is **in the tunnels below** and includes any models armed with **Grinderfists**.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Each time an attack made with this unit’s **Shock Gauntlets** scores a critical hit, that attack scores D6 hits on the target unit instead of 1. Make a wound roll for each hit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Warpfire Braziers** is 4.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 3-5, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. On a 6, inflict 2D3 mortal damage on the target.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: The target cannot use commands until the start of your next turn. In addition, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn. You cannot pick the same effect more than once per battle.
***Master of Dire Sorcery:*** Add 1 to casting rolls for friendly **^^Masterclan Wizards^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
***Commander of Vermin:*** Add 1 to charge rolls for friendly **^^Verminus^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
***Knower of Warp-tech:*** Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly **^^Skryre^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
***Deliverer of Weeping Blades:*** Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **^^Eshin^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
***Bringer of Plagues:*** Add 1 to chanting rolls for friendly **^^Pestilens Priests^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
***Shaper of Fleshcraft:*** **Heal (D3)** each friendly **^^Moulder^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll a dice. On a 3+:
• The target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.
• Subtract an amount equal to the roll from the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll 13 dice. For each 5+:
• Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
• You can return 1 slain model to a friendly **Clanrats** unit wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Reaction: You declared the ‘Redeploy’ command for a friendly **^^Eshin Infantry^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text:
If this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 4+, you can pick a point on the battlefield within 13" of this unit and within 1" of any enemy units. Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of that point.
**Designer’s Note:** *This ability allows the unit to set up in combat with a new enemy unit.*
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Crushing Bulk** is 4.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** units have **^^Ward (6+)^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
Roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect:
**1 *Magical Backlash:*** Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
**2-4 *Wall of Unholy Sound:*** Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks made by enemy units while they are within 13" of this unit.
**5-6 *Apocalyptic Doom:*** Roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 13" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy unit that does not have **^^Fly^^** and is within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: If the casting roll exceeds the target’s **^^Move^^** characteristic, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the difference between the casting roll and its **^^Move^^** characteristic.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 2 friendly **^^Verminus Infantry^^** units wholly within 13" of this unit to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: The targets can each use the ‘All-out Attack’ or ‘All-out Defence’ command this phase even if that command has been used by a friendly unit this phase.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a damaged enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. If the roll is less than the number of damage points the target has, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit is on the battlefield, add 2" to the distance friendly units can move when using the ‘Always Three Clawsteps Ahead’ ability.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the target has **^^Strike-last^^** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: This unit cannot use the ‘Divine the Future’ ability for the rest of the battle. Roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its **Warpforged Blade**.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Reaction: You declared a **^^Fight^^** ability for this unit
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly non-**^^Hero Verminus Infantry^^** unit that has not used a **^^Fight^^** ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a Fight ability immediately after the **^^Fight^^** ability used by this unit has been resolved.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Reaction: You declared a **^^Fight^^** ability for a friendly **^^Pestilens^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Reaction: You declared a **^^Shoot^^** ability for this unit, it was not set up this turn and it has not used a **^^Move^^** ability this turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of this unit’s **Warplock Musket** to 3 for the rest of the turn. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy **^^Hero^^** to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: For the rest of the turn, this unit and friendly **Warplock Jezzails** units wholly within 13" of this unit can ignore the effects of the ‘Guarded Hero’ ability (Core Rules, 25.0) when picking the target for their shooting attacks.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Reaction: You declared a **^^Shoot^^** ability for this unit, it was not set up this turn and it has not used a **^^Move^^** ability this turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of its **Doomrocket** to D3+3 for the rest of the turn. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit uses a **^^Shoot^^** ability, if all of its attacks targeted the same enemy unit, after that ability has been resolved, roll a dice. If the result is equal to or less than the number of models in that enemy unit that were slain by attacks made by this unit’s **Plagueclaw Catapult** this phase, that enemy unit has **^^Strike‑last^^** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If this unit has not used a **^^Move^^** ability this turn and was not set up this turn, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit's **Warplock Jezzails** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: If this unit is within the combat range of a friendly **^^Skryre Hero^^**, this unit’s **Hail of Warpstone Bullets** has an Attacks characteristic of 6D6+3 instead of 3D6+3 for the rest of the turn. However, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for an attack made with this unit’s **Hail of Warpstone Bullets**, inflict 1 mortal damage on this unit after the **^^Shoot^^** ability has been resolved.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If a friendly **^^Skryre^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit uses the 'Covering Fire' command, no command points are spent.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
This unit can move a distance up to its **^^Move^^** characteristic. This unit can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat.
Then, pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across during that move to be the targets. Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
**Designer’s Note:** *This unit can use this ability even if it is in combat.*
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text:
If the unmodified chanting roll for a friendly **^^Pestilens Priest^^** this phase was 6, pick 1 of the following effects to apply:
***Crimsonweal Curse:*** Pick an enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target. For the rest of the battle, each time the target uses a **^^Move^^** ability, inflict D3 mortal damage on it after the **^^Move^^** ability has been resolved.
***The Neverplague:*** For the rest of the battle, you can re-roll chanting rolls for friendly **^^Pestilens Priests^^**.
***Undulant Scourge:*** Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target. Inflict 2D3 mortal damage on the target.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with this unit to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
• Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
• Give this unit 1 ritual point.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s **Poisoned Wind Globes** for attacks that target an enemy unit that has 10 or more models.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Gnashing Teeth and Flailing Fists** is 8.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, roll a dice and apply the corresponding effect:
**1 *Dead:*** This unit is destroyed.
**2-4 *The Rats Emerge:*** Roll a D3 for each enemy unit in combat with this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. Then, this unit is destroyed.
**5-6 *It’s Alive!:*** This unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, **Heal (D6)** this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Each time a model in this unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. On a 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **^^Fight^^** ability has been resolved.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Friendly **^^Skaven Infantry Heroes^^** have **^^Ward (5+)^^** while they are within this unit’s combat range.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
The next time you make a casting roll for this unit this phase, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6. This roll cannot be rerolled or modified.
If the casting roll is 13, the spell is successfully cast and cannot be unbound. After the effect of that spell has been resolved, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.
If the casting roll is not 13, remove 1 dice of your choice from the casting roll and use the remaining 2D6 as the casting roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While friendly **^^Eshin^^** units are wholly within 13" of this unit, they can use **^^Shoot^^** and/or **^^Charge^^** abilities even if they used a **^^Run^^** ability in the same turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick another friendly **^^Moulder^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Pick another friendly **^^Moulder^^** unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its **Warpforged Halberd**.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly non-**^^Hero Verminus Infantry^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. Then, add 5 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Great Plague Censer** is 2.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Friendly **^^Pestilens^^** units have **^^Ward (6+)^^** while they are wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text:
If this unit is within the combat range of a friendly **^^Skryre Hero^^**, add 6 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Warp Lightning Blast** for the rest of the turn.
However, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for an attack made with this unit’s **Warp Lightning Blast**, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit after the **^^Shoot^^** ability has been resolved.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.
characteristics.name: Effect
Timing
characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: If this unit was not set up this turn, pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the target and more than 3" from all enemy units.

characteristics.name: Timing
characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: If this unit is in combat or charged this turn, this unit can make a pile-in move. Then, if this unit is in combat, you must pick 1 or more enemy units to be the target(s) of this unit’s attacks.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Resolve combat attacks against the target unit(s). Then, if this unit is in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but can only end that move in combat with units it was in combat with at the start of that move. It does not have to end the move in combat.
Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this **^^Manifestation^^**.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
Models can pass through this terrain feature but cannot be set up on or end moves on any part of this terrain feature.
Each time an enemy unit ends a move that passed through or across this terrain feature, roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of this terrain feature to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of another friendly **Gnawhole** and more than 9" from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven Infantry^^** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 6" of a friendly **Gnawhole** and more than 3" from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description:
**The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):
Cover**
rules.name: Gnawhole

characteristics.$text: When a number of damage points equal to this **^^Manifestation^^**’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this **^^Manifestation^^** is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If this **^^Manifestation^^** was not set up this turn, pick each enemy unit within 6" of this **^^Manifestation^^** to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice for each target. On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 2 from run rolls and charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 6" of this **^^Manifestation^^**. In addition, if an enemy unit passes across this **^^Manifestation^^** and/or the round-cornered triangle formed by drawing a line around all the bases of the **^^Manifestation^^**’s parts, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit after the **^^Move^^** ability has been resolved.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If this unit charged in the same turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Punch Dagger and Blade** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While each model in this unit is within 1" of any terrain features, this unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 9" of it.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This unit’s **Skritter** is a token. If you make a chanting roll of 1 for this unit while its **Skritter** is on the battlefield, you can remove its **Skritter** from the battlefield and then re-roll that chanting roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While each model in this unit is within 1" of a terrain feature, this unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks unless the attacking model is within 9" of it.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 2+, for the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are within 6" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to wound rolls for friendly **Stormvermin** units while they are wholly within 13"of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This unit has **^^Strike-first^^** for the rest of the turn but it cannot use commands this phase.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: You can pick 2 different eligible units to use the 'Always Three Clawsteps Ahead' ability this phase instead of 1, but at least 1 of those units must have the **^^Verminus^^** keyword.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This unit’s **Plague rat** is a token. If you make an unmodified chanting roll of 1 for this unit while its **Plague rat** is on the battlefield, you can remove its **Plague rat** from the battlefield and then re-roll that chanting roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

profiles.name: Vizzik Skour, Prophet of the Horned Rat

characteristics.$text: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: You can re-roll chanting rolls for this unit until the start of your next turn
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
Roll a dice. On a 2+, for the rest of the turn:
• If this unit is in combat with the target when the target is picked to use a **^^Fight^^** ability, all of the target's attacks must target this unit.
• Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target's combat attacks that target this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13"of this unit or a visible friendly **^^Skaven Infantry^^** unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text:
If the target is an enemy unit, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target's melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
If the target is a friendly unit, it can use 2 **^^Fight^^** abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has **^^Strike-last^^** for the rest of the turn.
If the chanting roll was 12+, you can pick 2 targets instead of 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit's **Warpvolt Obliterator** to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a D3 for each other enemy unit within the target's combat range. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Shooting Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **Warpvolt Scourgers** unit within this unit's combat range to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Attacks characteristic of the target's **Warpvolt Scourgers** to 10 for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick this unit and up to 1 friendly non-**^^Monster Skaven^^** unit if those units have not been deployed.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up those units in reserve **in the tunnels below**. They have now been deployed.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick this unit if it is **in the tunnels below**, then pick an enemy unit more than 6" from all other enemy units to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 4+, set up this unit within 3" of the target and more than 6" from all other enemy units. Then, set up the unit that was **in the tunnels below** with this unit within 3" of the target and more than 6" from all other enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
characteristics.name: Timing

characteristics.$text: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: This unit’s **Tik Tik** is a token. If this unit’s Tik Tik is on the battlefield, remove it from the battlefield and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll and the target has **^^Strike-last^^** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Set up this unit in reserve **drilling beneath the surface**. It has now been deployed.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick this unit if it is **drilling beneath the surface**.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
characteristics.name: Effect

modifiers.value: The Great-grand Gnawhorde can only contain MASTERCLAN, VERMINUS, SKRYRE, and MOULDER HEROES.

characteristics.$text: Each time a friendly non-**^^Hero Skaven^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit uses the 'All-out Attack' command no command points are spent.
characteristics.name: Effect

Any **^^Skaven^^** units

Any **^^Skryre^^** units

rules.description:
Add the **Crushing Bulk** weapon to your hero's warscroll. 
In addition, make the following changes to your hero's warscroll:
• Change the Health characteristic to 15.
• Change the Save characteristic to 4+.
• Replace the **^^Infantry^^** keyword with the **^^War Machine^^** keyword.
rules.name: Siege-Engine Chassis

rules.description:
Add the **Gnaw-beast's Chisel Fangs** weapon to your hero's warscroll.
In addition, make the following changes to your hero's warscroll:
• Change the Move characteristic to 9".
• Change the Health characteristic to 7.
• Change the Save characteristic to 4+.
• Replace the **^^Infantry^^** keyword with the **^^Cavalry^^** keyword.
rules.name: Gnaw-Beast

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Moulder-beast's Monstrous Limbs** is 3.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description:
Add the **Moulder-beast's Monstrous Limbs** weapon and the 'Battle Damaged' ability to your hero's warscroll.
In addition, make the following changes to your hero's warscroll:.
• Change the Health characteristic to 14.
• Change the Save characteristic to 4+.
• Change the Control characteristic to 5.
• Replace the **^^Infantry^^** keyword with the **^^Monster^^** keyword.
rules.name: Monstrous Horror

characteristics.$text: This unit earns D3 additional renown points after each Path to Glory battle.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **Clanrats** or **Stormvermin** unit within this unit's combat range to be its bodyguard.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: For the rest of the battle, while the bodyguard is wholly within 6" of this unit, add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by the bodyguard and this unit has **^^Ward (4+)^^**.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Pick a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit and not in combat to be the target.
characteristics.name: Declare

characteristics.$text: The target can move D6". It can move into combat.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit's melee weapons for each damage point it has.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a minimum of 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If this unit used a **^^Retreat^^** ability this turn, it cannot contest objectives for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit's attacks while it is within the combat ranges of any other friendly units.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Roll a dice each time you declare a command for this unit. On a 4+, unless you spend 1 additional command point to use that command, the command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use the command are still lost.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the 'Accelerated Regeneration' ability to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Accelerated Regeneration

rules.description: **^^Monster^^** only. Add the **Warpfire Launcher** ranged weapon to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Warpfire Launcher

characteristics.$text: If this unit or a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit wholly within 13" of this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit or that friendly unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per **^^Spell^^** ability.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the 'Best-best Warpstone Spikes' ability to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Best-best Warpstone Spikes

characteristics.$text: Each attack made with this weapon in a single phase must target the same enemy unit. Each hit inflicts 1 mortal damage on the target and the attack sequence ends.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the **Warp Lightning Strike** ranged weapon and 'Warp Lightning Strike' ability to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Warp Lightning Discharger

characteristics.$text: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attack made by enemy units while they are within 13# of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the 'Deafening Bell' ability to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Deafening Bell

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit uses a **^^Shoot^^** ability, if all of its attacks targeted the same enemy unit, after that ability has been resolved, roll a dice. If the result is equal to or less than the number of models in that enemy unit that were slain by attacks made by this unit's **Clawed Catapult** this phase, that enemy unit has **^^Strike-last^^** for the rest of the turn.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the **Clawed Catapult** ranged weapon and 'Revolting Barrage' ability to your hero's warscroll.
rules.name: Clawed Catapult

rules.description: Add 1" to your hero's Move characteristic.
rules.name: Frenzied

rules.description: Add 1 to your hero's Health characteristic.
rules.name: Bloated

rules.description: Your hero's **Warpforged Blade** has **Anti-X (+1 Rend)**, where **X** is one of the following keywords: **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Cavalry^^**, **^^Monster^^**, **^^War Machine^^**, **^^Wizard^^** or **^^Priest^^**
rules.name: Ruthless Opponent

rules.description: The Damage characteristic of your hero's **Warpforged Blade** is 3.
rules.name: Warpstone-infused Blade

rules.description: **^^Cavalry^^** only. Your hero's **Warpforged Blade** has **Charge (+1 Damage)**.
rules.name: Impaler

rules.name: Warpfire Musket

rules.description: Non-**^^Priest^^** only. Your hero has **^^Wizard (1)^^**. If this unit is already a **^^Wizard^^**, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Add the **Doomrocket** ranged weapon to your hero's warscroll. You cannot pick this upgrade if your hero has another non-**Companion** ranged weapon.

rules.description: Add the **Experimental Warpvolt Incinerator** ranged weapon to your hero's warscroll. You cannot pick this upgrade if your hero has another non-**Companion** ranged weapon.

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to chanting rolls for this unit.

characteristics.$text: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Crushing Bulk** is 4.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: If the current battle round number is odd, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **^^Skaven^^** units while they are wholly within 13" of this unit. If the current battle round number is even, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units that target a friendly **^^Skaven^^** unit while it is wholly within 13" of this unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.name: Timing
characteristics.$text: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: This unit’s **Bomb Rats** are tokens. If there are fewer than 2 friendly **Bomb Rats** next to enemy units, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit that does not have a friendly **Bomb Rat** next to it to be the target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Place this unit’s **Bomb Rat** next to the target.

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick each enemy unit that has a friendly **Bomb Rat** token to be a target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Roll a D3 for each enemy unit within a target’s combat range. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll. Then, remove the target’s **Bomb Rat**.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Double the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy **^^Hero^^**.

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text: Pick a visible friendly **^^Eshin^^** unit that has 2 or more models and that is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Roll a dice. On a 3+, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of the target. This unit can be set up in combat.

characteristics.name: Declare
characteristics.$text:
Pick a visible friendly **Gutter Runners** unit wholly within
13" of this unit to be the target.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Add 2 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly **Clanrats** unit that has 5 or more models, and there are no other friendly **^^Weapon Team^^** units within that unit’s combat range, this unit is not visible to enemy units more than 13" away.

characteristics.name: Effect
